info.name: Exam & Timetable API Collection
info.description:
Complete API collection for Exam + Timetable backend.

✅ BOTH EXAM AND TIMETABLE USE SAME AUTHENTICATION:
- Role-based login: /api/auth/{role}/login/ (Exam) or /api/timetable/auth/{role}/login/ (Timetable)
- Both support username, email, or teacher_code
- Both return same JWT token format

Use environment variables: {{base_url}}, {{superadmin_username}}, {{superadmin_password}}

request.description: Registers a generic user in the exam system. Uses accounts.User.

item.name: Exam - User Login

request.description: Exam-side login (email + password). Returns JWT tokens.

item.description: Generic Exam login - supports username, email, or teacher_code. Returns JWT tokens in same format as timetable. Use role-based login for better control.

request.description: Logs out the current user (uses Django session/JWT blacklisting depending on implementation).
Get current logged-in exam user profile.
Login as Super Admin for Exam system. Same authentication as Timetable. Supports username, email, or teacher_code.
Login as Admin for Exam system. Same authentication as Timetable.
Login as Teacher for Exam system. username can be username, email, or teacher_code.
Login as Student for Exam system.
Login as Staff for Exam system.
Change password for Exam user (any role).
Login as Super Admin (accounts.User with role SUPER_ADMIN or super_admin). Returns JWT tokens.
Login as Center Admin. Use credentials returned from create-admin API.
Login as Teacher. username can be normal username or teacher_code.
Login as Student.
Login as Staff (non-teaching).
Change password for current timetable user (any role).

Create a new Institute. Requires authentication. The creator becomes the institute admin.

**Note:** Institute can also be auto-created when creating a Center (if institute_name doesn't exist).
List all active institutes (public endpoint, no auth required for GET).
Get institute details by ID.

Creates a Center under an Institute.

**Required fields:**
- `institute_id` (integer): ID of the institute
- `name` (string): Name of the center
- `city` (string): City where center is located

**Optional fields:**
- `address` (string): Full address of the center

**Note:** You must first create the institute using the Create Institute endpoint, then use its ID here.

Creates a Center Admin. Response includes auto-generated username and password.

**Payload accepts either `center_name` OR `center_id`:**
- Use `center_id` (recommended when duplicates exist): `{"center_id": "uuid", ...}`
- Use `center_name`: `{"center_name": "Allen - Jaipur Center", ...}`

If multiple centers match the name, API returns list of matching centers with their IDs.

Creates a Teacher with auto-generated username/password and teacher_code.

**Payload accepts either `center_name` OR `center_id`:**
- Use `center_id` (recommended when duplicates exist): `{"center_id": "uuid", ...}`
- Use `center_name`: `{"center_name": "Allen - Jaipur Center", ...}`

If multiple centers match the name, API returns list of matching centers with their IDs.

Creates a Student with auto-generated username/password and enrollment.

**Note:** This endpoint actually requires `batch_code` instead of `center_id`. The payload should be:
```json
{
  "batch_code": "BATCH-001",
  "name": "Student Name",
  "email": "student@example.com",
  "phone_number": "9876543213",
  "date_of_birth": "2010-05-15"
}
```

If you need to create a student by center, you'll need to first get/create a batch for that center.

Creates a Staff member with auto-generated username/password.

**Payload accepts either `center_name` OR `center_id`:**
- Use `center_id` (recommended when duplicates exist): `{"center_id": "uuid", ...}`
- Use `center_name`: `{"center_name": "Allen - Jaipur Center", ...}`

If multiple centers match the name, API returns list of matching centers with their IDs.
Admin creates Teacher in their center (center_name not needed).
Admin creates Student in batches from their center only.
Admin creates Staff in their center (center_name not needed).

Creates an academic Program under a Center.

**Payload accepts either `center_name` OR `center_id`:**
- Use `center_id` (recommended when duplicates exist): `{"center_id": "uuid", ...}`
- Use `center_name`: `{"center_name": "Allen - Jaipur Center", ...}`

If multiple centers match the name, API returns list of matching centers with their IDs.
Lists all Programs in the current user's Center/Institute context.
Lists all Batches.
Get program details by ID.
Get batch details by ID.
Admin adds existing student to a batch.
Admin creates a Batch under a Program in their center. Requires a valid program_id.
List all centers. Query params: institute_id, city, search.
Get center details by ID.
List all programs in a center. Query params: search (search by name), is_active (filter by active status).

query.description: Search by batch code or name

request.description: List all batches in a center. Query params: program_id (filter by program), search (search by batch code or name).

query.description: Filter by role: ADMIN, TEACHER, STUDENT, STAFF

request.description: List all users in a center. Optional role filter.
List all timetables in a center.

Admin creates a timetable with date-based slots (D1..Dn) or weekly slots (mon..sun).

- For date-based: keys d1..dN within from_date/to_date range.
- For weekly: keys mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun.
Lists all generated timetables.
Returns JSON payload (teachers, batches, slots, constraints) for optimization code.
Get timetable details by ID.
Get day slots for a timetable.
Run genetic algorithm optimization for timetable. Checks feasibility first, then generates optimized timetable.
Admin sets the number of free classes for a timetable. Updates all DaySlots to mark first N slots as free classes for each day.
Get the number of free classes for a timetable.
Admin sets weekly teacher slot availability for a timetable.
Get weekly teacher availability for a timetable.
Get teacher availability organized by teacher instead of by slot.
Admin assigns a batch to a timetable.
Admin assigns teacher to batch with load configuration.
Get all batch-teacher assignments for a timetable.
Admin fixes a batch+teacher+subject into a specific day_slot.
Get all fixed (locked) slots for a timetable.
Get timetable for all batches (grouped by batch, day-wise d1..dN or mon..sun).
Get timetable for a single batch.
Get timetables for all teachers in a timetable.
Get timetable for a specific teacher. Optional teacher_code query param.
Get list of exams for the institute.
Get all exam patterns.
Get all question banks for the institute.
Fetches all questions for a given pattern/exam in a single optimized call.
